reconsent.title: Updated terms
reconsent.intro_first: To use afianco you need to accept our Privacy Policy and Terms of Service.
reconsent.intro_update: We have updated our Privacy Policy and Terms of Service. To continue using afianco, please accept the new version.
reconsent.what_changed_body: The new version clarifies how we process your data, lists our sub-processors by name (Hetzner, Anthropic, Stripe, Brevo) and formalises your GDPR rights (access, portability, erasure).
reconsent.checkbox_label: I confirm I have read and I accept the new Privacy Policy and Terms of Service.
reconsent.error_generic: We could not save your acceptance. Please try again in a moment.

cookie_banner.title: Essential cookies only
cookie_banner.body: We only use technical cookies that are strictly necessary for authentication and to remember your selected language. No third-party tracking, no external analytics, no advertising cookies.

customer_reconsent.title: Store terms updated
customer_reconsent.intro_first: To keep using your account you must accept the store's Terms and Privacy Policy.
customer_reconsent.intro_update: The store has updated its legal documents. To continue you must accept the new version.
customer_reconsent.what_changed_body: The store has modified its Privacy or Terms. The new version applies from now on.
customer_reconsent.checkbox_label: I confirm I have read and I accept the new version.
customer_reconsent.error_generic: We could not save your acceptance. Please try again in a moment.

dpa.page_subtitle: Document that governs our mutual obligations under GDPR Art. 28. We recommend reading it, saving a copy, and then confirming receipt.
dpa.ack_confirm_body: Do you confirm you have read and accepted the Data Processing Agreement in the version shown? The acknowledgement will be recorded in an immutable audit log.
dpa.ack_error: Acknowledgement failed. Please try again in a moment.
dpa.load_error: Could not load the DPA. Please try again in a moment.

admin_gdpr.section_subtitle: Configure the legal documents shown to your customers.
admin_gdpr.display_locale_help: Pick ONE language that ALL your customers will see, regardless of their browser. This will also be the legally binding language.
admin_gdpr.display_locale_change_warning: ⚠ Changing this will require registered customers to re-accept the new version.
admin_gdpr.variables_help: Click to copy. They will be substituted when you regenerate from the template.
admin_gdpr.generate_draft_confirm: Replace current content with the standard draft? Your edits will be lost.
admin_gdpr.publish_no_change: No changes to publish (current version is already live).
admin_gdpr.publish_confirm_body: They will be shown to your customers. Registered customers will need to re-accept on their next visit.
admin_gdpr.wizard_subtitle: Fill in these details and we'll prepare standard Privacy + Terms drafts in all 4 languages. You can edit them anytime.
admin_gdpr.wizard_field_ships_to_eu: Do you ship to the European Union?
admin_gdpr.publish_missing_content_error: The customer-facing language must have Privacy and Terms filled in.
admin_gdpr.publish_no_display_edits: You edited {{locales}} but your customers see the {{active}} version. To publish a new version, also edit the active language or change the store's primary language.
admin_gdpr.publish_identical_content: The content is identical to the published version. Nothing to publish.
admin_gdpr.vars_panel_subtitle: These details are inserted automatically into your legal documents. Update them here so you don't have to find them in the text.
admin_gdpr.vars_panel_regenerate_confirm: I will overwrite ALL 8 documents (Privacy and Terms in 4 languages) with the standard draft using the saved details. Manual edits will be lost. Continue?
admin_gdpr.vars_panel_no_vars: No details saved. Use the wizard to generate your documents.
admin_gdpr.active_locale_banner: Your legal documents will be shown to customers in {{language}}
admin_gdpr.active_locale_help: This is your store's primary language. To change it go to {{store_settings_link}}.
admin_gdpr.tab_non_active_warning: You are editing a translation NOT visible to customers. Only edits to the active language ({{active}}) trigger a new version.
admin_gdpr.publish_hint: Will publish the {{language}} version (the one shown to your customers).
admin_gdpr.publish_confirm_active_locale: The {{language}} version will be published, which is the one shown to your customers.

storefront_legal.not_found_body: The requested store does not exist or is not available.
storefront_legal.error_load: Could not load the document. Please try again later.
storefront_legal.not_configured_body: The store is completing its legal setup.

sub_processors.page_subtitle: Complete list of providers that process personal data on behalf of afianco, under GDPR Art. 28.3.i.
sub_processors.error_load: Could not load the sub-processor list.

marketing_unsubscribe.title: Unsubscribe from marketing emails
marketing_unsubscribe.intro: You are about to unsubscribe from marketing emails sent by {{merchant}} to {{email}}.
marketing_unsubscribe.already_hint: You appear to be already unsubscribed. You can confirm again if you want to be sure.
marketing_unsubscribe.note_transactional: You will continue to receive transactional emails only (order confirmations, receipts).
marketing_unsubscribe.done_body: You will no longer receive marketing emails from {{merchant}}. The change takes effect immediately.
marketing_unsubscribe.error_invalid_body: This unsubscribe link is not valid. Please contact the store directly to ask to be removed from the list.
marketing_unsubscribe.error_expired_body: This unsubscribe link has expired. Please contact the store directly to ask to be removed from the list.
marketing_unsubscribe.error_other_body: We could not record your request. Please try again in a few seconds.
